hero.headline: *Hundreds of feet* installed — built to last
hero.subheadline: We show up when we say we will, finish what we start, and build it exactly how you ask.

services_section.label: WHAT WE BUILD
services_section.heading: Every fence, every yard
services_section.subheading: From backyard privacy to commercial security — built solid

services.title: Privacy Fencing
services.description: Wood and vinyl privacy fences that block what you want blocked. Custom heights and styles.

services.title: Chain Link Installation
services.description: Commercial and residential chain link. Security without breaking the budget.

services.title: Fence Repair
services.description: Storm damage, rotted posts, sagging gates. We fix what's broken and reinforce what's weak.

services.title: Commercial Fencing
services.description: Industrial security fencing for businesses and properties. Built to commercial standards.

about.heading: Jackson's fence team
about.body: We're a Jackson fence crew that shows up on time and builds it right the first time. Hundreds of feet installed across the metro.

reviews.name: Dana P.
reviews.text: So pleased with the detail and professional approach. Hundreds of feet of fence that's really solid — exactly how we asked. They arrived on time and wasted no time.

reviews.name: John C.
reviews.text: Competitive price, showed up when they said they would. Finished too! Great looking fence. We were completely satisfied.

reviews.name: Chris C.
reviews.text: Quick quote and really good price. They arrived days after and did a fantastic job! Highly recommend.

cta.heading: Ready to fence it in?
cta.body: Free quotes, honest pricing, and we show up when we say we will. That's the Bankston way.
